markdown:
# Carpet of Flying

You can make this carpet hover and fly by taking a [[magic]] action and using the carpet's command word. It moves according to your directions if you are within 30 feet of it.

Four sizes of Carpet of Flying exist. The DM chooses the size of a given carpet or determines it randomly by rolling on the following table. A carpet can carry up to twice the weight shown on the table, but its [[fly_speed Speed]] is halved if it carries more than its normal capacity.

**Applicable Carpet Sizes**

| 1d100 | Size | Capacity | Fly Speed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 01-20 | [[carpet_of_flying_3_ft_5_ft of Flying, 3 ft. × 5 ft.]] | 200 lb. | 80 feet |
| 21-55 | [[carpet_of_flying_4_ft_6_ft of Flying, 4 ft. × 6 ft.]] | 400 lb. | 60 feet |
| 56-80 | [[carpet_of_flying_5_ft_7_ft of Flying, 5 ft. × 7 ft.]] | 600 lb. | 40 feet |
| 81-00 | [[carpet_of_flying_6_ft_9_ft of Flying, 6 ft. × 9 ft.]] | 800 lb. | 30 feet |
